description: SAM2 prompt + propagation: create or reuse SAM2 sessions, turn box prompts into persisted same-frame masks, and propagate saved masks across a selected frame range with progress and cancel support.

userStories.title: Fix unexpected page scroll on action-button clicks
userStories.description: As a user, I want the viewport to stay stable when I click Load frame after scrolling down so that exact-frame review controls do not jump the page.
acceptanceCriteria: Reproduce the current bug by scrolling down until `Load frame` is visible, then clicking it and observing unexpected viewport movement in the exact-frame review page
Identify and fix the layout or browser-scroll interaction that changes `window.scrollY` after `Load frame` expands the exact-frame pane
Add regression coverage or browser verification notes for the exact `Load frame` scroll-stability scenario
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser

userStories.title: Persist SAM2 session and propagation job metadata
userStories.description: As a developer, I want durable SAM2 session and job records so that prompt and propagation work stays isolated, trackable, and deterministic.
acceptanceCriteria: Add persisted `Sam2Session` and `Job` models with fields needed for session reuse, propagation progress, cancel state, results, and errors
Job rows support `sam2_propagation` work for one video and optional object, with deterministic progress counters and serialized payload/result metadata
Update `docs/engineering/data-model.md` and `docs/engineering/architecture.md` for SAM2 session/job storage and mask persistence rules
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add isolated SAM2 adapter and session lifecycle APIs
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a narrow SAM2 adapter and session endpoints so that predictor internals stay behind a dedicated service boundary.
acceptanceCriteria: Add dedicated backend SAM2 adapter/service module with narrow `create_session`, `close_session`, `prompt_box`, and `propagate` operations
Implement `POST /api/videos/{video_id}/sam2/session` to create or reuse a session for one indexed video and `DELETE /api/videos/{video_id}/sam2/session/{session_id}` to close it
Session lifecycle validates video ownership and local source path before any predictor work starts
Add integration test for session creation/reuse and document session contracts in `docs/engineering/api.md`
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Generate and persist same-frame SAM2 masks from box prompts
userStories.description: As a user, I want SAM2 to turn my box on frame N into a saved mask so that I can bootstrap annotation from exact-frame input.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement `POST /api/videos/{video_id}/sam2/prompt-box` for `session_id`, canonical `frame_idx`, `object_id`, and pixel box coordinates on backend-decoded frame image
Backend runs same-frame SAM2 prompt, stores mask file or RLE plus normalized box data on `FrameAnnotation` row keyed by `(video_id, frame_idx, object_id)`, and marks source `sam2`
Prompt-box response returns same canonical `frame_idx` and stored mask metadata for frame N without using browser playback time as annotation truth
Add integration test for prompt-box flow and document request/response contract in `docs/engineering/api.md`
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Run propagation as cancellable background job
userStories.description: As a user, I want mask propagation to run in background with progress so that long frame-range work does not block review.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement `POST /api/videos/{video_id}/sam2/propagate` to create `sam2_propagation` job from `session_id`, `start_frame_idx`, optional `end_frame_idx`, direction, and selected `object_ids`

Background propagation writes frame results deterministically to persisted annotations and mask storage while updating `Job.status`, `progress_current`, `progress_total`, `result_json`, and `error_message`
Implement `GET /api/jobs/{job_id}` for status/progress and `POST /api/jobs/{job_id}/cancel` to stop further propagation cleanly
Add integration test for propagation job lifecycle and document job contracts in `docs/engineering/api.md` and `docs/engineering/architecture.md`
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add typed frontend SAM2 workspace client and state
userStories.description: As a developer, I want typed frontend SAM2 clients and workspace state so that session, prompt, and job data stay parsed and separate from canonical frame state.
acceptanceCriteria: Add typed frontend client methods and boundary parsers for session create/close, prompt-box, propagate, job status, and cancel APIs
Feature state tracks active `session_id`, same-frame SAM2 request state, propagation job state, and progress without replacing canonical `currentFrameIndex`
Add frontend tests for SAM2 payload parsing and workspace state transitions
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add Run SAM2 same-frame mask flow
userStories.description: As a user, I want to click Run SAM2 after drawing a box so that frame N shows a preliminary mask for selected object.
acceptanceCriteria: With selected video, object, and drawn box on exact frame N, user can click `Run SAM2` to request same-frame mask generation
UI shows pending and error states, overlays returned mask on exact frame N, and reloading frame N shows persisted `sam2` annotation instead of temporary-only UI state
Same-frame mask flow stays anchored to backend exact-frame image and selected object identity, not browser playback time
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add propagation controls, progress, and cancel UI
userStories.description: As a user, I want to choose range and direction, watch progress, and cancel propagation so that SAM2 tracking stays controllable.
acceptanceCriteria: User can choose propagation direction (`forward`, `backward`, or `both`) and selected frame range from current canonical frame context
Starting propagation shows live job status and progress while rest of review UI remains usable
User can cancel active propagation job and UI reflects cancelled state without hanging or forcing page reload
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Expose persisted propagated masks in review flow
userStories.description: As a user, I want propagated frames to reopen with saved masks so that I can inspect SAM2 results across chosen range.
acceptanceCriteria: As propagation completes, timeline markers or frame summaries refresh so propagated frames become visible in review workflow
Opening a propagated frame loads persisted mask data for that exact `frame_idx` from backend storage, not only transient in-memory job output
User can inspect saved masks on resulting frames after forward or backward propagation over chosen range
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser
Typecheck passes
